reasoning: Pixel-art heart with layered pink→green→blue rings is immediately charming and hits the toy/sticker test squarely. Silhouette is universally readable even at 1x — the heart shape registers instantly despite small size. On dark bg the pink outer ring pops with strong contrast and the gem-like layered palette gives it real personality. On light/cream bg the outer pink softens noticeably and the edge contrast drops; still legible but not as punchy. At 1x on the grey panel, detail is lost (green and blue interior collapse) — acceptable for a VFX asset at native resolution but the remaining pink mass reads slightly muted against mid-grey. No aggressive or edgy shapes; all curves and round pixels, fully aligned with Echoes of Wisdom soft-toy aesthetic. Misses 8 (pass) primarily because light-bg contrast needs a touch more punch on the outer silhouette pixels to hold up across all surface types.
